summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Atera IT equipment landing page. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor brands marquee selector issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Brands marquee component selector [data-testid='brands-marquee'] not found, but brands section and logos are displaying correctly

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (auth, public banners/brands, contact form, admin CRUD)
Landing page loads with hero carousel and auto-slide functionality
Products section displays with 3 product cards (Laptops, Gaming Desk, Monitor Arms)
Brands section shows with brand logos (HP, Lenovo, Dell, VIYERO)
Contact form submission works and saves to database
Admin login with credentials admin@atera.com.tr / admin123
Admin dashboard - Banner management (view, add dialog, cancel)
Admin dashboard - Brand management (view, add dialog, cancel)
Admin dashboard - Messages view (1 message found)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor marquee selector issue, all functionality working)
